hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day for bold moves. Trust your instincts, as they will lead you to exciting adventures.
aries.love: Romantic sparks are in the air. A surprise gesture may light up your relationship.
aries.career: Your leadership skills will shine today. Others may look to you for guidance.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on grounding yourself in your beliefs and values.
taurus.love: Communicate openly with your partner for a stronger connection.
taurus.career: Patience pays off. Stick to your plans, and success will follow.

gemini.general: Networking is favored today. Reach out and connect with those around you.
gemini.love: Prepare for a deep conversation that could strengthen your bond.
gemini.career: Creativity will flourish in team projects. Share your ideas.

cancer.general: Emotional insights will guide your decisions today. Listen to your intuition.
cancer.love: Spend quality time with loved ones; it will bring peace.
cancer.career: Focus on collaboration for best results. Teamwork is essential.

leo.general: Let your inner light shine. Opportunities will arise that require your uniqueness.
leo.love: Romance is favored. A spontaneous event could lead to something special.
leo.career: Your confidence will impress others. Take the lead on projects.

virgo.general: Details matter today. Pay attention to the little things for a successful outcome.
virgo.love: Support your partner with thoughtful gestures; they will appreciate it.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will help solve complex problems.

libra.general: Balance is key today. Strive to find harmony between different aspects of your life.
libra.love: Relationships flourish when nurtured with honesty and kindness.
libra.career: Seek feedback for self-improvement in your work.

scorpio.general: Deep emotional connections are possible. Allow yourself to be vulnerable.
scorpio.love: Passion ignites as you explore new romantic possibilities.
scorpio.career: Your determination will lead to success in challenging situations.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls you today. Seek out new experiences and expand your horizons.
sagittarius.love: Share your dreams with your partner to deepen your bond.
sagittarius.career: Innovation is key at work; think outside the box.

capricorn.general: Focus on your long-term goals. Stay disciplined and dedicated today.
capricorn.love: A stable relationship brings you comfort and support.
capricorn.career: Your hard work is recognized; keep pushing forward.

aquarius.general: New ideas will flow today. Embrace your innovative side.
aquarius.love: Social events may lead to exciting romantic encounters.
aquarius.career: Collaboration fuels success. Partner with creative minds.

pisces.general: Your intuition is heightened. Trust your feelings to guide you through challenges.
pisces.love: Express your emotions to strengthen bonds with loved ones.
pisces.career: Creative projects will succeed. Allow your imagination to run wild.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: Do what you love, and you'll never work another day in your life.
professional.author: Confucius

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
motivation.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Anonymous

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Every day may not be good, but there is something good in every day.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: The best is yet to come.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: What a lovely surprise to finally discover how unlonely being alone can be.
captions.author: Ellen Burstyn

captions.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
captions.author: Helen Keller

captions.text: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
captions.author: Dalai Lama

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Deming

tech.text: Technology, like art, is a soaring exercise of the human imagination.
tech.author: Daniel Bell

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don’t have the guts.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: You may be surprised at what you can achieve when you remember to believe in yourself.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is a bird that feels dawn breaking and sings while it is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: To one who has faith, no explanation is necessary. To one without faith, no explanation is possible.
faith.author: Thomas Aquinas

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, you should first listen.
wisdom.author: Plato

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha
